waypoints.name: Sunol
waypoints.description: Named GPS waypoint in East Bay, commonly used for routing south of Oakland and Hayward airspace

waypoints.name: Pyramid VOR
waypoints.description: Pyramid VOR - key navigation aid for Central Valley routing and Delta region transitions

waypoints.name: Concord VOR
waypoints.description: Concord VOR navigation aid located at Buchanan Field, useful for northern routing around SFO Class B

waypoints.name: Sacramento VORTAC
waypoints.description: Sacramento VORTAC - primary approach and departure navigation aid for Sacramento Executive Airport
